name: credit-card-discounts
description: Find card-linked offers, issuer discounts, shopping portal deals, brand promotions, and stackable savings for planned purchases.

interface.shortDescription: Find card offers and stackable brand savings
interface.longDescription: Use Credit Card Discounts to match a user's credit cards to card-linked offers, shopping portals, merchant promotions, statement credits, and stackable savings for desired brands or planned purchases.
defaultPrompt: Find discounts for my cards at Nike.
Which card should I use for this brand?
